title: Guidance documents: Biologics, radiopharmaceuticals, cell and gene therapies - Canada.ca
content:
## Guidance documents: Biologics, radiopharmaceuticals, cell and gene therapies
The following guidance documents have been prepared to assist in the interpretation of the policies governing statutes and regulations.
- Guidance on information and submission requirements for biosimilar biologic drugs
- Guidance on the Lot Release Program for Schedule D (biologic) drugs Summary of changes Periodic quality report template (PQR) Annotated version of the periodic quality report template

- Submission  information for biologic  drugs (Division 4, Schedule D)
- Food and Drug Regulations for public health emergency drugs
- Regulatory roadmap for biologic (Schedule D) drugs in Canada

- Quality Overall Summary – Biologic Products (QOS-B)
